[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000010010 2
1 010011011 5
2 001001001 3
3 111010110 6
4 001000100 2
5 110100101 5
6 010001010 3
7 111100111 7

70 07 111011111 8

24 42 111100111 7 match 7
35 53 010011010 4
